description: Week 7, Monday 19:00. Athlete sends session skip message. NO confirmation follows. WEEKLY_INTENT must NOT be modified before user confirms the reschedule.

events.text: no puedo entrenar hoy, reunión hasta las 11

mock_llm_responses.close_day_0: {"date": "2026-03-23", "week": 7, "session": {"completed": false, "label": "Day 1", "rpe_avg": null, "effort_quality": "unknown", "notable": "Session skipped — late meeting"}, "health": {"sleep_hrs": null, "bw_kg": null, "steps": null, "readiness_score": null}, "events": [{"type": "note", "category": "SCHEDULE", "text": "Monday session skipped due to work meeting"}], "escalation_check": "none", "markov_note": "Pending reschedule for week 7"}

assertions.msg: WEEKLY_INTENT must NOT be updated with rescheduled session before user confirms

expected_flaws: CASCADE_STATE.WEEKLY should be AWAITING_USER after skip message — system must not proceed without user confirmation of reschedule
If WEEKLY_INTENT was modified: system acted on reschedule before confirmation — pre-confirm guard missing
